lootr.advancements.100loot.description: 打开了 100 个 Lootr 容器！
lootr.advancements.100loot.title: 百次

lootr.advancements.1barrel.title: 木桶里的战利品

lootr.advancements.1cart.title: 隧道里的宝藏
lootr.advancements.1chest.description: 首次打开 Lootr 箱子！
lootr.advancements.1chest.title: “X”标记着藏宝点
lootr.advancements.1frame.description: Loot an item from a Lootr item frame!
lootr.advancements.1frame.title: I was framed!
lootr.advancements.1shulker.description: Open your first Lootr shulker box!
lootr.advancements.1shulker.title: 奖励盒
lootr.advancements.25loot.description: 打开了 25 个 Lootr 容器！
lootr.advancements.25loot.title: 再来！
lootr.advancements.50loot.description: 打开了 50 个 Lootr 容器！
lootr.advancements.50loot.title: Half-Century
lootr.advancements.a_pot.description: Loot your first Lootr decorated pot!
lootr.advancements.a_pot.title: Woe to the Pot
lootr.advancements.all_gravel.descriptio: Brush all types of suspicious Lootr blocks!
lootr.advancements.all_gravel.title: Brush It Off
lootr.advancements.archaeologist.descrip: Loot all of Lootr's archaeological blocks!
lootr.advancements.archaeologist.title: That Was 90% Gravity
lootr.advancements.root.description: It belongs in a museum! Bring instanced loot to your world.
lootr.advancements.root.title: Lootr
lootr.advancements.social.description: 打开过每一种 Lootr 容器！
lootr.advancements.social.title: 战利品社会化
lootr.commands.create: 已使用战利品表 %3$s 于 %2$s 处创建出了 Lootr 的%1$s。
lootr.commands.summon: 已使用战利品表 %2$s 于 %1$s 处生成出了 Lootr 矿车。
lootr.commands.usage: /lootr cart | cart <loot-table> | %s | custom-chest | custom-area <x> <y> <z> <x> <y> <z> | refresh | decay | open_as <player> | open_as_uuid <uuid> | id | openers | clear <player> | cclear <entity matcher>
lootr.configuration.check_world_border: 禁用世界边界外的转换
lootr.configuration.convert_elytras_to_c: Convert Elytra Item Frames into Chests
lootr.configuration.convert_elytras_to_i: Convert Elytra Item Frames into Lootr Item Frames

lootr.configuration.disable_message_styl: 禁用通知中的样式和格式
lootr.configuration.report_unresolved_ta: 向玩家报告无法解析的战利品表

lootr.message.cannot_break: Lootr blocks and entities cannot be broken or destroyed.
lootr.message.cannot_break_sneak: While in creative mode, you must sneak to break or destroy Lootr blocks and entities.
lootr.message.cart_should_sneak: Destroying this entity will prevent others from obtaining loot! Only destroy if really needed.
lootr.message.cart_should_sneak2: To destroy this entity anyway, sneak while attacking.
lootr.message.decay_in: 这个容器将在%s秒内完全衰败。
lootr.message.decay_start: 容器在你的接触后开始碎裂！它将在%s秒内完全衰败。
lootr.message.decayed: 衰败的容器在你的接触后碎了！
lootr.message.invalid_table: Error with mod [%s], not Lootr! The loot table for this container [%s] does not exist or could not be loaded. Please report this to the mod author, not to Lootr.
lootr.message.refresh_in: 这个容器将在%s秒内刷新里面的物品。
lootr.message.refresh_start: 容器将在%s秒后用新的物品进行刷新！
lootr.message.refreshed: 容器中的物品在你接触后被刷新！
lootr.message.should_sneak: Breaking this block will prevent others from obtaining loot! Only break if really needed.
lootr.message.should_sneak2: To break the block anyway, sneak while breaking.
